reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강쥐랑 아침마다 러닝하는데 손으로 리쉬를 잡지 않아도 되니 너무 편해요^^오염이 되어도 물티슈로 닦으면 되니 관리도 편하고 항상 깨끗해서 좋아요~구매하길 잘 한듯 하네요 아주 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: I go running with Kangji every morning, and it's so convenient not having to hold the leash with my hands ^^ Even if it gets dirty, I can just wipe it with a wet wipe, so it's easy to maintain and always stays clean. I'm really glad I bought it. Very satisfied!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
바깥 산책을 좋아하는데, 다니다보니 실외배변견이 되었어요.
여기저기 방수줄 찾아보딘 바잇미를 알고 사봤는데, 할인할 때 구매해서 조금 저렴하게 구매했어요. 어떤색을 살까 고민했는데, 상품받아보고 상품 퀄리티에 놀랬어요. 색감도 예쁘고, 부드럽고, 무겁지않고, 마감도 꼼꼼하고, 일부러 잠금장치있는 걸 사다보니 라지 사이즈 샀는데 튼튼해보이고 좋아요. 가위자는 산책할때 강아지가 잡아 당기다보니 풀어질 때가 있었거든요. 고민한만큼 잘 산것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: My dog loves outdoor walks, and he's become a dog that does his business outside. I looked around for waterproof leashes here and there, found out about BITE ME and bought it. I got it at a discount so it was a bit cheaper. I was wondering which color to get, but when I received the product, I was amazed by the quality. The color is pretty, it's soft, not heavy, the finishing is meticulous, and since I purposely bought one with a lock mechanism in large size, it looks sturdy and I love it. With a regular leash, it would come undone when my dog pulls during walks. I feel like I made a good purchase after all that deliberation.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저는 하네스보다 목줄을 선호하는 편인데 지금까진 맘에드는 목줄을 못찾고 한두번 쓰고 집에 굴러다니는 목줄 천지였어요! 애가 작아서 무게부터 버클까지 한개가 맘에들면 소재가 맘에안들구 이런식으로 일년 넘게 이것저것 사모으기만 하다가 방수 목줄이라길래 천소재에 생활 방수된 건줄알고 색이예뻐서 구매한건데 고무? 같은 느낌의 처음 써보는 재질이 왔더라구요! 결론은 요즘 완전 최애템이에요.. ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 사실 리뷰가 아니고 노란색도 재구매 하려구 들어온건데 생각나서 써요! 저한테는 어께에 매면 리드줄이 좀 길어서 최대한 줄여서 쓰느라 풉백이 바닥에 끌릴려고 하지만 ㅋㅋ 일단 색이 너무 예쁘구 한달내내 매일 써도 땅에 많이 닿는 부분 색조금 변한거 말고는 튼튼해요! 저는 그럼 다른색을 구매하러 가겠습니당 총총 아 저희 강아지는 2.3키로 비숑이에요! 겁이 있는편이라 큰소리 나는 버클이나 무거운 목줄은 들면 바로 도망가요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I prefer collars over harnesses, but until now I couldn't find one I liked. I just kept buying collars one or two times and then having them collect dust at home! Since my dog is small, if I like one thing from the weight to the buckle, I dislike the material, and it was like this for over a year just collecting different things. Then I saw it was a waterproof collar and thought the fabric had water resistance, so I bought it because the color was pretty, but it came in this rubber-like material I'd never used before! Anyway, it's become my absolute favorite item now.. lol Actually, this isn't really a review—I came here to rebuy the yellow one—but I'm writing since it came to mind! For me, when I wear it on my shoulder the lead is a bit long, so I have to shorten it as much as possible and the pull back drags on the ground lol but anyway the color is so pretty and even wearing it every day for a month straight, except for the color slightly changing where it touches the ground a lot, it's sturdy! So I'm going to go buy another color. Oh, our dog is a 2.3kg Bichon! He's a bit fearful, so when he sees loud buckles or heavy collars, he runs away right away lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
귀염둥이 울 아가입니당
너무 이쁜목줄이에요 색깔도 이쁘고 울강쥐에게 딱 잘어울려요
아쉬운건 사이즈미스로 ㅠㅠ S로 구매했어야 했는데
제일끝까지 쥴여서 채웠는데 미용하게되면 많이 헐렁거릴것같아요 ㅠㅠ 교환할지 고민했는데 이미 택을 때버린상태라
조심히 써야할거같네용
작은애기도 키우는 다둥이네인데 S로 하나더 구매해야되겠습니당 하네스만 쓰다가 목줄 써보는데 애들도 편하고 당기는것도
줄어드는것같아요
처음쓸때는 아무래도 버클이 많이 뻑뻑하긴하네요
쓰다보면 부드러워질것같아요
튼튼하게 오래쓰고 싶네용!
reviews.content_en: My adorable little pup~ It's such a pretty collar! The color is pretty and it looks perfect on my Kangji. The downside is the size mishap ㅠㅠ I should have bought size S but I had to tighten it all the way to fit it. It'll probably be loose when I get a grooming ㅠㅠ I was thinking about exchanging it, but I already threw away the tag, so I'll have to be careful with it. Since I'm raising multiple small dogs, I need to buy one more in size S. I used to only use harnesses but now using a collar, it's more convenient for the dogs and pulling seems to have decreased. The buckle is pretty stiff when first used, but I think it'll soften as I use it. I want to use it well for a long time!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 이거 크로스백처럼 연결해도 되고, 이렇게 손목에 팔찌처럼 연결해도 되는데 크로스백처럼 매고 강아지 가슴줄과 연결하면 끈이 땅에 잘 끌리지 않고 제어하기도 딱 편한 길이랍니다. 양손이 자유로워서 날이 추울 때 양손 다 주머니에 넣고 산책 가능해서 정말 너무 편해요! 강아지와의 산책이 정말 편해졌어요.
reviews.content_en: This can be connected like a crossbody bag, or like this worn as a bracelet on the wrist, but when you wear it like a crossbody bag and connect it to your dog's chest harness, the leash doesn't drag on the ground much and it's the perfect length for control. Both hands are free so when it's cold, I can put both hands in my pockets and go for a walk—it's really so convenient! Walking with my dog has become so much easier.

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
솔직히 목줄은 소형견한테 무조건 나빠! 라는 한심한 주인이 저였어요. 처음에는 그래서 하네스 목줄을 사용했어요. 근데 산책을 너무 안좋아하고 자꾸 안갈려고 고집을 부리는 거예요.
그래서 그때부터 뭐가 문제일까 고민했죠.
처음에는 훈련을 열심히 했어요. 그래도 제자리 걸음인 느낌에 지쳐갈때쯤 저희집 강아지 특성이 생각나더라구요. 안기는 것도 별로 안좋아하고 몸 만지는것도 그닥 안좋아하는 아이가 하네스를?!

그래서 바로 목줄을 구매했죠. 사설이 길었죠? 이 목줄을 사용하고부터 아이가 산책을 제대로 하기 시작했어요ㅠㅠ 주인 몸에도 감을 수 있어서 두손 사용하기 편하니 완전 주인도 아이도 너무 룰루랄라한 산책이 가능하답니다.

색갈도 너무 이쁘고 기능도 좋고. 목줄이 없다면 안살 이유가 없어요! 개인적인 바람으로는 야광 목줄도 나왔으면 좋겠어요!!
reviews.content_en: Honestly, I was that pathetic owner who thought leashes are absolutely bad for small dogs. At first, that's why I used a harness collar. But my dog really didn't like walks and kept refusing to go. So I started wondering what the problem was. At first, I trained hard. But when I was getting tired of just marking time in place, I remembered my dog's personality. He doesn't really like being held and doesn't like being touched much, so a harness?! That's when I bought this collar right away. Sorry for the long story! After using this collar, my dog started taking proper walks ㅠㅠ Since it can be wrapped around the owner's body, it's convenient to use both hands, so now both the owner and the dog can have completely happy walks! The color is so pretty and the function is great. There's no reason not to get this collar! My personal wish is that they'd make a reflective collar too!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
방수되는걸 찾는데 많지가 않아서 무게랑 가격때문에 망설이다가 구입

가격이 넘 비싼 반려용품들을 보면 
그 작은돈으로 유기견들한테 보태고싶다는 ..
생각에  ..

이건 고무같은 느낌이라 조금 무게감있지만 그리 무겁고 하진않고
보호자 158키 보통체형에 상체에 반으로 걸어도 적당한 길이 나옵니다
두꺼운옷엔 힘들듯

색상 사진과같고 이쁩니다
연결하는게 약해보이지만 오래 사용했음해요

선물도 감사해요
reviews.content_en: I was looking for something waterproof, and since there aren't many options, I hesitated because of the weight and price before buying. When I see overpriced pet products, I think I wish I could give that money to abandoned dogs instead... This has a rubber-like feel so it has some weight but it's not that heavy, and for a guardian who's 158cm with average build, wearing it diagonally across the upper body gives an appropriate length. It might be difficult with thick clothing. The color is as in the photos and it's pretty. The connection looks weak, but I hope it lasts a long time. Thank you for the gift too.

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
(장점)
1. 끈이 생각보다 튼튼합니다
2. 길이조절도 되고 버클이 있어서 좋습니다
3. 색감이 너무예뻐요!
4. 연결고리가 360도 회전되서 강아지가 움직여도 줄이 안꼬입니다

(단점)
생각보다 무게가있어서 소형견이 쓰기엔 힘들지않나 싶어요

이상 너무 만족스러웠습니다!
reviews.content_en: (Pros) 1. The leash is sturdier than expected 2. The length is adjustable and it has a buckle which is great 3. The color is so pretty! 4. The connector rotates 360 degrees so the leash doesn't twist even when the dog moves around (Cons) It's heavier than expected, so I'm wondering if it might be difficult for small dogs to use. All in all, very satisfied!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
색상도 예쁘고 부드럽고 탄탄해 보여요 다만 때가 잘 탈것 같기도한 재질이라서 사용후 가끔씩 닦아서 보관해야 할듯합니다
수영을 즐기는 보더콜리~ 올여름 수영장용으로 준비해 놓았어요^^
참고로 저희아가는 목둘레 42이고 L가 잘 맞아요
세일 자주 했음 좋겠어요~~♡
reviews.content_en: The color is pretty and it looks soft and sturdy. However, it's a material that seems to stain easily, so I'll need to wipe and store it occasionally after use. My Border Collie loves swimming~ I prepared this for the pool this summer ^^ By the way, my pup has a neck circumference of 42cm and size L fits perfectly. I hope they have sales more often ♡

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
워터프루프에 꽂혀서 샀는데 색도 이쁘고 마감부분들이나 이런것도 신경써서 만든 제품같아요
끈이 매끈매끈 완벽방수재질에 탄력이 있는 재질입니다
다만 끈이 좀 많이 무거워요.
저는 괜찮은데 목걸이가 강아지가 살짝 무거울꺼 같다는 생각은 했습니다. 물놀이 자주가는 분 아니면 굳이라는 생각입니다
reviews.content_en: I bought it because I was hooked on waterproof features, and the color is pretty and it seems like a product made with care in finishing and details. The leash is smooth and has a perfect waterproof material with elasticity. The only downside is the leash is quite heavy. It's fine for me, but I did think the collar might be a bit heavy for the dog. If you don't go swimming often, I'd say it's not really necessary.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
수영할때, 바다 들어갈때 잘 사용했어요!
핸즈프리 터음 이용해보는데 너무 편해서 여행 다녀오고나서 산책 나갈때 매일 사용중입니다! 색이 너무 마음에 들고 젖지 않아서 너무 좋습니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Used it great for swimming and going into the ocean! 🏖️ First time trying hands-free and it's SO convenient that I've been using it every day on walks since getting back from my trip! Love the color and it doesn't get wet, which is amazing ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content:
너무너무 예뻐요 색감 짱 
근데 아쉬운 점은 계절을 잘못 선택한 것 같아요 핸즈프리라 요즘 같이 추운 날 주머니 손 넣고 쓰기 너무 좋긴한데 재질이 천이 아니고 차가워지는? 소재라 밖에서 만지고 싶지 않아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 여름에 살 걸 또 생각보다 먼지가 잘 붙어서 산책 다녀오고 물티슈로 슥 닦으면 때가 때가 엄청나요 
그래도 핸즈프리라는 점과 디자인에서 점수 다 드렸어요
reviews.content_en: It's so so pretty, the color is amazing 💯 But the downside is I think I picked the wrong season ㅋㅋㅋ It's hands-free so it's super convenient to use with your hands in your pockets on cold days like these, but the material gets cold (not fabric), so I don't want to touch it outside ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Should've gotten the summer version 😭 Also, dust sticks to it more than expected—after a walk, one wipe with a wet wipe and it gets SO dirty. Still, I gave it full marks for the hands-free feature and the design!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무너무 귀여워요 여름/겨울 아주 유용할것같고 생각보다는 때가 잘타요 ㅠㅠ일부러ㅜ바닷가 가서 사용하려고 준비해서 사용했는데 최고였어요
reviews.content_en: It's so so cute 🥰 Seems like it'll be super useful for summer and winter! It does get dirty faster than expected ㅠㅠ I prepared it specifically to use at the beach and it was the best!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 걷기대회 참가했었는데 다른 아이가 요 목줄하고 리드줄 하고 있더라구요~ 산 타는데 나뭇잎이나 흙도 안묻고 너무 좋아보여서 어디 제품인지 물어보고 집 오자마자 바로 구매 했습니다. 생각보다 더 튼튼하고 너무 맘에들어요!!
reviews.content_en: I was at a walking competition and I saw another dog wearing this leash with a lead 🐕 We were hiking and it didn't get dirt or leaves on it at all—looked so good that I asked where it was from, and bought it right when I got home. It's sturdier than I thought and I absolutely love it!!

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 보리는 타로밀크티 컬러로, 완두는 아프리콧 컬러로 세트구매 했어요💜🧡 컬러도 맘에 들고 비오는 요즘 날씨에 매일 하는 산책템으로 최고에용👍👍
reviews.content_en: Got a set for Bori in the Taro Milk Tea color and Wandu in the Apricot color 💜🧡 Love the colors and it's the best walking gear for these rainy days lately 👍👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
1kg 아기 첫 리쉬에요 ❤️🫶🏻🐶
바잇미에서 첫 리쉬 사고싶엇는데 성공!
그리고 방수리쉬라 질질 끌려도 더러워지는게
덜한거같아서 좋아요!
산책하고 물티슈로 닦으니 깨끗해지네요~!

그리고 아기랑 잘어울리는 색이라 만족해요!
좀 더 크면 이제 마카롱 하네스도 사야겟어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: First leash for my 1kg baby ❤️🫶🏻🐶 Wanted to get the first leash from BITE ME and we did it! And since it's a waterproof leash, even when it drags through mud, it doesn't get as dirty, which is great! After walks, one wipe with a wet wipe and it's clean again~! Plus the color suits my baby perfectly so I'm happy! Once she gets a bit bigger, I'll have to get the Macaron harness too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
13키로 사모예드 믹스랑 지내고 있습니다! 목줄이랑 세트로 같은 색으로 구매했어요! 길이도 길고 손잡이처럼 해도 되고 몸에 둘러도 되는제품인데 둘다 편하네요!!
고리도 엄청 튼튼해서 부서질 걱정은 없을것같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I have a 13kg Samoyed mix! Got it as a set with a collar in the same color! The length is long and you can use it as a handle or wrap it around your body—both ways are convenient!! The ring is super sturdy so I don't think it'll break ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 효****
reviews.content:
소형견이지만 리드줄 넓이는 2센치 정도 되는걸 선호해서 하네스 S, 리드줄 M으로 구매했는데 딱 좋아요!
확실히 요즘 비오고 난 다음 나갈 때 입히면 좋은 것 같아요
기존 웨빙은 그냥 시커멓게 변색될 정도였는데 이건 그렇게 많이 묻어도 티도 안 나고 물티슈로 닦아주면 깨끗해지네요!
reviews.content_en: Even though it's a small dog, I prefer about 2cm wide leash straps, so I got the S harness and M leash—perfect fit! Definitely seems great to use after it rains these days. My old webbing used to turn completely dark from staining, but this doesn't show dirt even with a lot of mud, and it cleans right up with a wet wipe!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 7개월령 8.5kg 똥갱쥐 M사이즈 잘 맞아요. 하네스보다 목줄을 선호하는데 장마기간이다 보니 기존에 사용중인 목줄이 금방 젖고 더러워지더라고요. 그래서 처음으로 워터푸르프로 구매해봤어요. 산책 다녀온 뒤 물티슈로 쓱 닦아주면 돼서 굉장히 편리합니다! 잘 사용할게요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: 7-month-old 8.5kg pug, M size fits perfectly. I prefer leashes over harnesses, and since it's monsoon season, my regular leash was getting wet and dirty really fast. So I tried waterproof for the first time. Just a quick wipe with a wet wipe after walks and you're done—super convenient! Will use it well ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
줄이 생각보다 길군요
잘 쓸 것 같아요 색이 너무 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: The leash is longer than I expected 😊 Think I'll use it well! The color is so pretty 💕

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
말랑말랑한 실리콘 제질이에요!
여태 써보던 천 하네스랑은 달라 촉감에 적응이 필요하지만 색감도 예쁘고 때도 방수도 된다니 맘에 듭니다 ㅎㅎ
아 그리고 매고다닐 수 있는 점도 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: It's made of soft, squishy silicone! It's different from the fabric harnesses I've used before, so it took some getting used to, but I love the pretty color and the fact that it's waterproof and easy to clean 😊 Oh, and I really like that I can wear it all day!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 소재가 좋고 튼튼한 것 같습니다 관리도 용이할 것 같구요
reviews.content_en: The material is nice and seems very durable. It also looks like it'll be easy to maintain.

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
쓰던걸 준건가요 b급 상품을 준건가요.
펜션 놀러가는데 비온다고해서 주문했더니만 받고보니 누가 반품한걸 준건지 뭔지 고리에 스크레치 나있고 얼룩 안지워지고...
리뷰 남기려고 보니 누구는 b급 상품 구매했다는 리뷰가있는데
저도 b급으로 주신건지요...?
제값 주고 구매한건데 짜증남 ㅠ 
심지어 지금 베스트 상품 아이템에 2만원때 상품도 팔고있는데 그건 2만원때니 그러려니 하겠는데 거즘 5만원 주고 산 난 왜 이모양임?
색깔은 이쁩니다 ㅠ
reviews.content_en: Did you send me a used product or a B-grade item? I ordered it because it was supposed to rain when we went to the pension, but when it arrived, the ring had scratches on it like someone had returned it, and there are stains that won't come off... When I tried to leave a review, I saw that someone else had written about getting a B-grade product, so did you send me a B-grade item too...? I paid full price for this and it's so frustrating 😢 On top of that, the best sellers section has items for 20,000 won, so I get why those are that price, but why does mine look like this when I paid almost 50,000 won for it? The color is pretty though 😢

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content:
노란색이 밝아서 예쁜듯?.!
pvc 소재여서 줄 조절할때 좀 불편할까했는데 생각보다 부드러워서 좋음
reviews.content_en: The yellow is bright and looks really pretty! I was worried it might be inconvenient to adjust the straps since it's PVC material, but it's softer than I expected, so it's great!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 야외활동을 좋아하는 우리가족에게 아주 적합한 리쉬
reviews.content_en: This leash is perfect for our family who loves outdoor activities!

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
방수줄이라 쉽게 때도 안타고 너무 편하네요
크로스로 메고 산책하기도 충분한 길이라 양손의 자유를 맛보고 있어요
reviews.content_en: Since it's a waterproof leash, it doesn't get dirty easily and it's so convenient! The length is perfect for wearing it crossbody and going for walks, so I'm enjoying having my hands free!

reviews.name: 사****
reviews.content: 여기서 구매한 워터 목걸이는 제가 라지로 사서 아예 못 쓰고 있는데 이건 잘 쓸 것 같아요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought a water collar from here in large and I can't use it at all, but I think I'll actually use this one 😄

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 손이 자유로워서 인간도 편하네요^^ 색감도 예쁘고 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en: It's nice having free hands—makes things easier for us humans too^^ The color is pretty and I'm very satisfied.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
길이가 길어서 좋구요
색상도 타로 색상 이쁘네요 마음에 들어요
reviews.content_en: I like that it's long, and the color is a nice taupe shade. I'm really happy with it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 다른색 써보고 오염제거도쉽고 색도예뻐서  보라로 하나더샀어요~
reviews.content_en: I tried other colors and found they're easy to clean and look pretty, so I bought another one in purple!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 리더줄 편하게 잘쓰고있습니다.크로스로 몸에 채울수있ㅇ니서 양손이 자유로운게 좋네요
reviews.content_en: I'm using the leash comfortably. It's great that I can wear it cross-body style so both my hands are free! 🐕

reviews.name: 살****
reviews.content:
컬러감이 이쁘네요
소재도 튼튼해요
3,3키로 잘맞아요
reviews.content_en: The color is really pretty! The material is also durable. It fits my 3.3kg pup perfectly.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 색감쨍하고 가볍고 젛아요
reviews.content_en: The color is vibrant and it's lightweight and nice! ✨

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 사진그대로에요 너무이뻐요! 잘사용할거같네요
reviews.content_en: It's exactly like the pictures and so pretty! I think I'll use it well.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
길이가 길어서 긴 목줄 찾으시는 분들께 추천합니다!
비오는날 사용하고싶어서 구매했는데
평소에도 사용하고 있어요~
밝은 색상 사용하니 금방 더러워지긴 하네요
reviews.content_en: The length is long so I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a longer leash! I bought it because I wanted to use it on rainy days, but I'm using it regularly now~ The bright color does get dirty pretty quickly though.

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 안써봤는데 일단 눈으로만족함 색감이너무이쁨 우리 아들이랑 너무잘어울림
reviews.content_en: I haven't used it yet but visually I'm so satisfied! The color is so pretty and it matches so well with my boy! 💕

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
실리콘같은 재질의 끈이에요!
색감 너무 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ
재질이 어색하긴한데 때타도 염려없어 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's made of a silicone-like material! The color is super cute ㅎㅎ The material feels a bit unfamiliar at first, but it's great because I don't have to worry about stains.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 좀더 긴줄이 필요해서 구매했습니다 ~색이 참이뻐요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because I needed a longer leash~ The color is really beautiful!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
깨끗하게 쓸수있어 좋아용
근데 조금 무거워용
reviews.content_en: It's great that I can keep it clean, but it's a bit heavy.

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 나중에 훌쩍 커버리는 단풍이를 위해 넉넉한 사이즈로 했어요!
reviews.content_en: I chose a generous size for Danpung who's going to grow so much taller later! 🍂

reviews.name: 차****
reviews.content: 비오는날 잘 쓸 것 같아서 목줄이랑 세트로 구매해봤어요~ 생각보다 튼튼하게 잘 쓸 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a set with a leash since I thought it would be good for rainy days~ It seems sturdier than I expected!

reviews.name: 갱****
reviews.content: 쓰던건데 할인할때 다른색상으로 하나 더 주문했어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I was already using it, and I ordered another one in a different color when there was a discount haha

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 가장 잘 사용하는 바잇미 목줄! 목둘레 진짜 20도 안되는데 이 목줄은 잘맞아서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My go-to BITE ME leash! My pup's neck is really under 20cm, and this leash fits perfectly so I'm happy with it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 핸즈프리찾다가 지난번에 동생네 선물해줬는데, 좋아서 저도주문했어요~이제 여름이니까요 ㅎ 스몰을 사용해도 되지만,튼튼하게 오래쓰려고 미듐으로 주문했어요.
reviews.content_en: I was looking for a hands-free option and gifted one to my sister last time, and she loved it so I ordered one for myself too~ Since it's summer now hehe I could use Small, but I ordered Medium to make it more durable and last longer.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
요새 너무 잘쓰고 있는 목줄 :) 
튼튼하고 좋아요 워터프루프라고 해서 구매했아요
reviews.content_en: The leash I've been using so much lately :) It's sturdy and great! I bought it because it said it was waterproof

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 애프리콧 사용하다가 추가 구매했어요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I was using Apricot and ordered it again haha

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 이번에 비가 많이 와 산책할 때 사용한 리드줄을 세탁하고 말리고 힘들어 구매했난데 좋아요. 다만 비가 안 오는 날은 손 쓸림이 있을 수 있네요.
reviews.content_en: There was so much rain lately and it was tiring to wash and dry the leash I used for walks, so I bought this and I like it. However, on days without rain there might be some hand chafing.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 물놀이가거나 우중산책시 우용할듯해서 구입햇는데  색도 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: I bought it thinking I'd use it for water play or rainy day walks and the color is pretty too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 목줄이랑 셋트로 주문...색상 다자인 사용하기도 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: Ordered it as a set with the leash... It's nice to have different colors and designs to use.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 물놀이하려고 샀어요~ 귀엽고 시원해보여요
reviews.content_en: I bought it for water play~ It's cute and looks refreshing!
